Ibn al-Bawwab

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Qur'an of Ibn al-Bawwab
by Ibn al-Bawwab
Abbasid · 1000–1001 CE · Baghdad
The earliest surviving Qur'an in cursive naskh script — the style that would outlast the angular Kufic. Copied by one of Islam's greatest calligraphers in a single year.
←Angelos Akotantos Ismail al-Jazari→
